name: Pro Swing
about: Pro Swing is an indoor golf simulator facility located in South Carolina with locations in Chapin and Forest Acres. The venue utilizes award-winning GolfZon simulator technology, including TwoVision and TwoVision NX systems, to provide a realistic and precise golf experience. Play is offered on a per-bay basis, with rates for 1-6 players, making it suitable for individuals, groups, and events. The facility is positioned as a climate-controlled space where golfers can access prestigious courses on their own time and schedule.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art GolfZon TwoVision simulator technology recognized for realism and precision
Play on world's most prestigious courses in a climate-controlled, relaxing environment
Flexible scheduling and private bay rentals for individuals and groups of up to 6 players
Availability of PGA and Leadbetter Academy certified instructors for lessons
Option to host corporate and charity events at the facility

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service. BYOB is not explicitly mentioned.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced model in the TwoVision lineup
Recognized with 2024 Golf Digest Editor's Choice Award

faq.answer: An 18-hole round will take 2 hours for 1 or 2 players and 2-3 hours for 3 or 4 players.
